title: 饮食禁忌
content: 对花生和虾严重过敏，外出就餐需要提前告知服务员。曾有过两次严重过敏反应入院记录。

title: tech-preference
content: User prefers TypeScript over JavaScript for new projects. Reason: better type safety and IDE support.

title: 运动习惯
content: 每天早上6点起床跑步5公里，坚持了3个月。周末加一次游泳1500米。

title: sleep-schedule
content: Usually goes to bed at 11 PM, wakes at 6 AM. Light sleeper, uses earplugs. Melatonin 3mg on travel days.

title: reading-habit
content: Reads 2 books per month. Prefers non-fiction: behavioral economics, systems thinking, history of science.

title: allergy-cats
content: Allergic to cats. Cannot visit homes with cats without medication. Takes cetirizine when needed.

title: morning-routine
content: Morning routine: wake 6AM, coffee, 30min reading, then work by 7:30AM. No phone first 30 minutes.

title: ide-preference
content: Favorite IDE: VS Code with Vim keybindings. Key extensions: GitLens, Prettier, ESLint, Copilot.

title: lang-pref
content: Preferred programming language is Python for data work, Rust for systems, TypeScript for web.

title: communication-style
content: 偏好异步沟通，重要决定用文档而非会议。会议前需要提前24小时收到议程。

title: sprint-planning-2026-04
content: Sprint planning decided to migrate auth service to OAuth2 by end of Q3. Team lead: Alice. Priority: P1.

title: cors-fix-nginx
content: Encountered CORS error when calling /api/v2/memories from frontend. Fixed by adding Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Authorization to nginx config.

title: db-stack
content: Database uses PostgreSQL 16 in production (upgraded 2026-03 from v14). Read replicas in us-east-1 and eu-west-1.

title: rate-limit-v2
content: API rate limit increased to 500 req/min per user after infrastructure upgrade. Old limit was 100.

title: mascot
content: Project mascot is a cat named Whiskers, used in all marketing materials and error pages.

title: ci-pipeline
content: CI pipeline: GitHub Actions, build+test on PR, deploy on merge to main. Average pipeline time: 8 minutes.

title: error-monitoring
content: Error monitoring uses Sentry. Alert threshold: >5% error rate triggers PagerDuty. On-call rotation weekly.

title: architecture-overview
content: Deployed microservice architecture with 12 services. API gateway handles routing. Service mesh uses Istio.

title: perf-baseline
content: Performance baseline: API gateway P99 latency is 45ms. Service mesh adds ~8ms overhead. Total budget 200ms.

title: deployment-strategy
content: Blue-green deployment with canary releases. 5% canary for 30 minutes before full rollout. Automated rollback on error spike.

title: tech-debt-tracker
content: Current tech debt items: 1) Legacy auth middleware (P1), 2) Untyped API responses (P2), 3) Manual DB migrations (P3).

title: onboarding-checklist
content: New dev onboarding: 1) Set up local env, 2) Read architecture doc, 3) Deploy to staging, 4) Shadow a PR review, 5) First ticket within week 2.

title: rust-ownership
content: Rust 的所有权系统核心规则：每个值有且只有一个 owner，owner 离开作用域时值被 drop。借用规则：任意时刻只能有一个可变引用或多个不可变引用。

title: docker-tips
content: Docker best practice: use multi-stage builds to reduce image size by 60-80%. Pin base image versions. Never run as root in production.

title: python-list-comp
content: Python list comprehension: [x**2 for x in range(10)] creates squares. Generator expression with () for memory efficiency.

title: git-rebase
content: Git rebase vs merge: rebase rewrites history for clean linear log. Interactive rebase for squashing commits. Never rebase public branches.

title: sql-joins
content: SQL JOIN types: INNER keeps matches only, LEFT keeps all left rows, CROSS produces cartesian product. Use EXPLAIN for query planning.

title: docker-volumes
content: Docker volumes persist data beyond container lifecycle. Use named volumes for production. Bind mounts for development hot-reload.

title: transformer-paper
content: Paper: Attention Is All You Need. Key contribution: self-attention mechanism replaces recurrence entirely. Results: BLEU 28.4 on EN-DE translation.

title: rag-metrics
content: RAG evaluation metrics: faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision, context recall. Use RAGAS framework for automated evaluation.

title: react-hooks
content: React hooks rules: only call at top level, only call in function components. useState for state, useEffect for side effects, useMemo for memoization.

title: kubernetes-basics
content: Kubernetes core concepts: Pod is smallest unit, Deployment manages ReplicaSets, Service exposes Pods. ConfigMap for config, Secret for sensitive data.

title: oauth2-flows
content: OAuth2 flows: Authorization Code for web apps, PKCE for mobile/SPA, Client Credentials for service-to-service. Always use HTTPS.

title: caching-strategies
content: Caching strategies: cache-aside (lazy loading), write-through, write-behind. TTL for expiration. Cache invalidation is one of two hard problems in CS.

title: saas-costs
content: Monthly SaaS subscriptions total $1,847. Largest: AWS $890, Vercel $120, GitHub Enterprise $63, Sentry $45.

title: revenue-targets
content: Q3 revenue target: $480K MRR. Current run rate: $320K. Gap requires 50% growth in 3 months. Top accounts: Acme Corp, TechStart.

title: chapter-3
content: 第三章：林小雨在暴风雨中发现了一座废弃的灯塔，里面住着一个失忆的老人。老人手里握着一张褪色的照片。

title: chapter-5
content: 第五章：林小雨返回城市后，开始调查灯塔的历史。市档案馆的记录显示灯塔建于1932年，曾是渔民的救命标志。

title: character-profile-lin
content: 林小雨人物档案：28岁，调查记者，性格倔强但善良。父亲在她12岁时失踪，这成为她从事调查工作的原动力。

title: llm-scaling-laws
content: Scaling laws for LLMs: loss scales as power law with compute, data, and parameters. Chinchilla optimal: tokens ≈ 20x parameters.

title: rlhf-overview
content: RLHF pipeline: SFT on demonstrations, train reward model on comparisons, optimize policy with PPO. DPO simplifies by skipping reward model.

title: vector-db-comparison
content: Vector DB comparison: Pinecone (managed, easy), Weaviate (open, hybrid), Milvus (scalable, GPU), Chroma (lightweight, local). Choose based on scale needs.

title: travel-japan-2025
content: 2025年日本旅行：东京3天+京都2天+大阪1天。最喜欢京都的岚山竹林。下次想去北海道看薰衣草。

title: meeting-notes-0301
content: March 1st meeting: discussed Q1 retro, marketing campaign results, and hiring plan. Action items: update job postings by March 8.

title: incident-2026-02-15
content: Production incident 2026-02-15: Database connection pool exhaustion. Root cause: missing connection timeout. Fixed by setting pool_timeout=30s.

title: linear-algebra-notes
content: Linear algebra essentials: matrix multiplication, eigenvalues/eigenvectors, SVD decomposition. Used in ML for dimensionality reduction (PCA).

title: gift-ideas
content: Birthday gift ideas for mom: silk scarf (preferred), tea set (backup), book on gardening. Budget: $50-80.

title: api-versioning
content: API versioning strategy: URL path versioning (/v1/, /v2/). Breaking changes get new major version. Deprecation period: 6 months minimum.

title: css-grid-guide
content: CSS Grid: grid-template-columns for column definitions, grid-template-rows for rows. fr unit for flexible space. gap for spacing.

title: tax-deductions-2025
content: 2025 tax deductions: home office $1,200, professional development $800, equipment $2,400. Total: $4,400.

title: recipe-collection
content: Favorite recipes: 1) Thai green curry (30min), 2) Sourdough bread (24h ferment), 3) Tiramisu (no-bake, 4h chill).

title: security-audit-q1
content: Q1 security audit findings: 2 high (XSS in search, IDOR in user profile), 5 medium, 12 low. All highs patched by March 20.

title: system-design-patterns
content: System design patterns: CQRS for read/write separation, event sourcing for audit trail, saga for distributed transactions.

title: fitness-goals
content: 2026 fitness goals: run a half marathon, bench press body weight, 10 pull-ups consecutive. Currently: 10K PR, 70% BW bench.

title: feature-flags
content: Feature flag system: LaunchDarkly for prod, environment variables for dev. Naming convention: FF_FEATURE_NAME. Clean up flags older than 30 days.

title: networking-basics
content: TCP vs UDP: TCP reliable ordered delivery, 3-way handshake, flow control. UDP best-effort, lower latency, used for streaming and gaming.

title: investment-notes
content: Investment allocation: 60% index funds, 20% bonds, 15% real estate, 5% crypto. Rebalance quarterly. Emergency fund: 6 months expenses.

title: logging-standards
content: Logging standards: structured JSON logs, include request_id and user_id. Levels: ERROR for failures, WARN for degradation, INFO for key events.

title: music-taste
content: Favorite music: jazz (especially Coltrane, Miles Davis), lo-fi beats for coding, classical for reading. Spotify heavy user.

title: functional-programming
content: FP core concepts: pure functions, immutability, higher-order functions, pattern matching. Haskell for learning, Elixir for production.

title: data-pipeline
content: Data pipeline: Kafka for ingestion, Spark for processing, Delta Lake for storage, dbt for transformations. SLA: <5min end-to-end.

title: language-learning
content: Learning Japanese: N3 level, studying 30min/day with Anki. Goal: N2 by end of 2026. Watching anime without subtitles for immersion.
